version_description: My words are the correct words that MG sings and all the in between chords are added in. It's complete.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Who Will The Next Fool Be

content:
[Capo 2]

[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse One]

[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
When the night has come[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
And the land is dark[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
And the moon is the only light we'll see[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
No, I won't be afraid[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
No, I won't be afraid[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Just as long, as you stand by me.[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Darling, stand by me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Won't you stand by me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
If you're in need won't you stand  stand by me[/tab]

[Verse Two]

[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
And if the sky that we look upon[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Should ever crumble and fall[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
And the mountains should fall to the sea[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
No I won't be afaid[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
No, I won't shed a tear[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Just as long  juast as long as you stand by me[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Darling, stand by me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Won't you stand by me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
If you're in need won't you stand  stand by me[/tab]
